---
title: "Assessments With Generative AI:  Before, During, and After"
bibliography: references.bib
author:
  - name: Lee Clift
    email: lee.clift@strath.ac.uk
    corresponding: true
    affiliations: Department of Computer and Infomation Science, University of Strathclyde
  - name: Olga Petrovska
    email: olga.petrovska@swansea.ac.uk
    corresponding: true
    affiliations: School of Mathematics and Computer Science, Swansea University

keywords:
  - assessment
  - Generative AI
  - competency
---

## First: things to include

### Subsection references

An example citation [@williams2010pair].

An example citation @williams2010pair.

### Subsection link types

<https://quarto.org>

[example link](https://quarto.org)

### Subsection images

picture: with caption, source, title, alt and link
![Some Caption](/chapters/images/C36_pair-programming-across-disciplines_online_ideas.png "Some Title"){fig-alt="Some alt text."}

picture wrapped in a link, this way picture links to somewhere

[![Some Caption](/chapters/images/C36_pair-programming-across-disciplines_online_ideas.png "Some Title"){fig-alt="Some alt text."}](https://quarto.org)

::: {.content-visible when-format="html" unless-format="epub"}

## References {.unnumbered}

:::
